customizeTabsDescription: Choose which tabs appear in your bottom navigation bar and arrange them in your preferred order.
fontHint: For the best experience, we recommend using the theme font.

messagesSettings.title: Messages
messagesSettings.hideDeletedAccountsHint: Don't show chats whose other participant has deleted their account.

notImplemented: This setting is not available yet.
updateEmailIntro: Enter the new email address you want on your account. Bluesky will send a verification token to your current address before the change takes effect.
updateEmailTokenSent: Check your current email for a verification token, then enter it below.
updateEmailSuccess: Email updated. Check your new inbox to confirm.
updateEmailFailed: Couldn't update your email. Try again.
passwordIntro: Bluesky doesn't store your password directly. Tap below and we'll email you a reset link.
passwordResetSent: Reset email sent. Check your inbox.
passwordResetFailed: Couldn't send a reset email. Try again.
handleIntro: Pick a new handle for your account. Other people use this to find you. You can change it later.
birthdayIntro: Used to show age-appropriate content. Bluesky never shows your birthday on your profile.
birthdaySaveFailed: Couldn't save your birthday. Use the format YYYY-MM-DD.
automationLabelHint: Mark this account as automated (for example, a bot or scheduled poster). Other clients can show or hide it accordingly.
exportDataIntro: Download a copy of every record on your account as a CAR file. The file is portable to any other AT Protocol client.
exportDataFailed: Couldn't export your data. Try again.
exportDataNativeNotice: On mobile, this opens a share sheet so you can save the file to Files / iCloud / cloud storage.
deactivateAccountIntro: Deactivating hides your profile and posts. Sign back in any time to restore the account.
deactivateAccountConfirm: Are you sure you want to deactivate this account?
deactivateAccountFailed: Couldn't deactivate your account. Try again.
deleteAccountIntro: Deleting your account is permanent. You'll need a confirmation token from email and your password.
deleteAccountRequestSent: Check your inbox for a confirmation token, then return here.
deleteAccountRequestFailed: Couldn't send a confirmation token. Try again.
deleteAccountFailed: Couldn't delete your account. Check the token and password and try again.
appPasswordsIntro: App passwords let you sign in to other Bluesky clients without giving them your main password. You can revoke them at any time.
appPasswordsEmpty: You haven't created any app passwords yet.
appPasswordsRevokeFailed: Couldn't revoke that app password. Try again.
appPasswordsCreateFailed: Couldn't create an app password. Try again.
appPasswordsCreatedNotice: Copy this password now — Bluesky won't show it again.
notifyOthersIntro: Who can send you notifications for replies, mentions, and quotes.
loggedOutVisibilityToggle: Discourage apps from showing my account to logged-out users
loggedOutVisibilityDescription: Discourage signed-out users from seeing your account.
loggedOutVisibilityNotice: Note: Bluesky is an open and public network. This setting only limits the visibility of your content on the Bluesky app and website, and other apps may not respect this setting. Your content may still be shown to logged-out users by other apps and websites.
analyticsDescription: Help improve Akari by sharing anonymous, aggregated usage data. No personal information is collected and no cookies are used.
analyticsNotice: We use Plausible Analytics, a privacy-focused service that does not track individuals across sites or sessions. You can turn this off at any time.
interactionSettingsIntro: These settings will be used as defaults when creating new posts. You can edit these for a specific post from the composer.
whoCanReplyListsEmpty: You don't have any lists yet
moderationListsEmpty: You aren't subscribed to any moderation lists yet.
moderationServicesIntro: Custom labelers can add additional moderation labels to posts and accounts.
moderationServicesEmpty: You aren't subscribed to any moderation services.
mutedAccountsIntro: Muted accounts have their posts removed from your feed and from your notifications. Mutes are completely private.
mutedAccountsEmpty: You haven't muted any accounts yet. To mute an account, go to their profile and select "Mute account" from the menu on their account.
blockedAccountsIntro: Blocked accounts cannot reply to your threads, mention you, or otherwise interact with you. You will not see their content and they will be prevented from seeing yours.
blockedAccountsEmpty: You haven't blocked any accounts yet. To block an account, go to their profile and select "Block account" from the menu on their account.
mutedWordsEmpty: Nothing muted yet. Add a word, phrase, or tag above and posts that match will disappear from your feeds.
mutedWordSaveFailed: Couldn’t save your muted-word change. Try again.
verificationBadgesHint: Hides every verified-account badge across the app, regardless of who issued it.
trustedVerifiersEmpty: You haven’t marked anyone as a trusted verifier yet. Tap a verifier in any verification sheet to add them.
enableAdultContentHint: Show posts and media labelled as adult. Off by default.
manageSavedFeedsIntro: Reorder, pin, or remove the feeds saved to your account.

followingCleanup.title: Following cleanup
followingCleanup.intro: Find accounts you follow that have gone quiet so you can decide who to keep. Scans the latest post (including replies and reposts) for every follow; likes aren't counted.
followingCleanup.scanHint: Checks the most recent activity for every account you follow. Results stream in as they come back.
followingCleanup.scanPaused: Paused at {{count}} of {{total}}. Resume to keep going.
followingCleanup.resultsEmpty: Run a scan to see who's gone quiet.
followingCleanup.resultsStreaming: Scanning… matches will appear here as they're found.
followingCleanup.noMatches: Nothing matches the current threshold. Try a shorter window.
followingCleanup.skippedHint: These accounts will be hidden from future scans on this device.
followingCleanup.skippedScanAgainHint: Scan again to see who you've skipped.

externalMediaIntro: Choose which third-party embeds load inline. Disabled providers fall back to a plain link card.
requireAltTextHint: Block sending an image post unless every image has an alt-text description.
displayLargerAltTextBadgesHint: Use a more prominent badge on images that have alt text.
displayLargerTextBadgesHint: Use a larger, more legible text size for engagement counts (likes, replies, reposts).
notificationCategoriesIntro: Choose which notifications you want to receive and how they reach you.
notificationCategoryNotFound: We don't recognise that notification category.
notificationSaveFailed: Couldn't save notification preferences. Try again.
appLanguageHint: Select which language to use for the app's user interface.
primaryLanguageHint: Select your preferred language for translations in your feed.
contentLanguagesHint: Select which languages you want your subscribed feeds to include. If none are selected, all languages will be shown.
contentLanguagesSaveFailed: Couldn't update content languages. Try again.
systemLogIntro: Recent console output captured in-app. Useful when reporting an issue.
enableTrendingVideos: Enable trending videos in your Discover feed
followingFeedPreferencesIntro: Choose what shows up on your Following timeline.
yourInterestsIntro: Pick a few topics so the Discover feed and recommendations can match you with related accounts and posts.
yourInterestsEmpty: Tap a topic to add it to your interests.
threadPreferencesIntro: Choose how replies under a post are sorted, and whether posts from accounts you follow appear higher.
threadPreferencesPrioritise: Prioritise replies from people you follow
threadPreferencesSaveFailed: Couldn't save thread preferences. Try again.

network.title: Network
network.intro: Akari talks to two upstream services: an AppView that aggregates the network into the views you see (feeds, profiles, search) and an image CDN that hosts thumbnails and avatars. By default both are operated by Bluesky Social. Pick alternatives below to route around them.

appView.title: AppView
appView.enabledDescription: AppViews aggregate the network into the timeline, search, notifications, and trending you see. Turn this off to use Akari with only direct PDS reads, slingshot, and constellation. Many features become unavailable in that mode.

disabledWarning.title: AppView disabled
disabledWarning.body: Timeline, search, post search, typeahead, trending topics, labelers, preferences sync, and DMs are unavailable without an AppView. Profiles, individual posts, engagement counts, follower lists, and custom feeds keep working.

unavailable.title: Unavailable without AppView
unavailable.body: You've turned the AppView off in Network settings. Turn it back on to use this feature.

appView.customHint: Enter the AppView's HTTPS base URL and its service DID. Both are published in the AppView operator's `did:web` document under the `#bsky_appview` service.
appView.perAccountHint: Leave an account on "Use default" to follow the app-wide setting above. Override individual accounts when one needs a different AppView.

bsky.label: Bluesky
bsky.description: public.api.bsky.app, the default AppView operated by Bluesky Social.

blacksky.label: Blacksky
blacksky.description: api.blacksky.community, a community-run AppView with custom moderation.

custom.label: Custom
custom.description: Point at any AppView by URL + DID.

ai.title: AI
ai.intro: Your data on AT Protocol is public, so these settings tell AI services how they may use it. Akari respects your choices and shares them with other services, who can choose to respect them. Bad actors may ignore these signals, which is outside our control. The preferences apply across your entire account. Safety tools like spam and bot detection aren't affected.
ai.section: How AI may use your data

training.label: Allow training
training.hint: Use your posts to build or train AI models. Once your data is part of a model, it stays there even if you later delete your account.

inference.label: Allow inference
inference.hint: Let AI look up your posts when answering someone's question. The AI doesn't keep your data, but may quote or reference it in real time.

embedding.label: Allow embedding
embedding.hint: Let AI search and recommendation systems use your posts. This is how AI finds similar accounts, groups users by interests, and decides what to surface in feeds like Discover or For You.

syntheticContent.label: Allow synthetic content
syntheticContent.hint: Let AI generate new content modelled on your data, like imitations of your writing, AI versions of your photos or audio, or bots designed to sound like you.

cdn.intro: Image URLs returned by the AppView point at Bluesky's CDN by default. Pick a different CDN here and matching URLs (avatars, banners, post thumbnails) will be rewritten to use it. The path layout matches across mirrors, so a host swap is enough.

bsky.label: Bluesky
bsky.description: cdn.bsky.app, the default CDN operated by Bluesky Social.

custom.label: Custom
custom.description: Point at any compatible CDN by URL.

ozoneLabeler.title: Ozone labeler
ozoneLabeler.didHint: Which Ozone labeler the moderation tools talk to. Defaults to the official Bluesky moderation service; change this only if you run your own Ozone instance.
ozoneLabeler.usingDefault: Using the default Bluesky moderation labeler.
ozoneLabeler.usingCustom: Using a custom Ozone labeler. Settings only apply on this device.
ozoneLabeler.entryDescription: Configure which Ozone instance the moderation tools talk to.
